texto: You are what you desire. You may live with desires and determine all that you want
autor: But your actions determine what and how much you receive.
explicacao: Citação de But your actions determine what and how much you receive. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “You are what you desire. You may live with desires and determine all that you want” articula reflexao, gian-kumar, desire em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
